steps.title: Substitute daylight minutes
steps.content:
The equation is $x+y=1{,}440$, where $x$ is daylight minutes and $y$ is non-daylight minutes. Substitute $x=715$:
$$
715+y=1{,}440
$$

steps.title: Solve for non daylight
steps.content: Subtract $715$ from both sides: $$ y=1{,}440-715=725 $$ The answer is B.
